title: ci: migrate renovate.json5 to podman-container-tools/automation
body:
## Problem

Skopeo's `.github/renovate.json5` still extends:

```
github>containers/automation//renovate/defaults.json5
```

The `AUTOMATION_RELEASE` custom manager lives in `podman-container-tools/automation` (podman-container-tools/automation#29). Podman already migrated its renovate config; skopeo has not.

## Impact

PR #2911 adds `AUTOMATION_RELEASE` to `ci.yml`, but Renovate will not update it until this config is migrated.

## Proposed fix

Update `.github/renovate.json5` to extend:

```
github>podman-container-tools/automation//renovate/defaults.json5
```

Mirror podman's change ("renovate: point config to new repo").

## Related

- PR #2911 — adds `AUTOMATION_RELEASE` to ci.yml
- podman-container-tools/automation#29 — adds the custom manager
